item.title: Bouncing Ball
item.description: Bouncing Ball A simple bouncing ball animation created with Rive. An experiment with Rive animation tools and state machines.

item.title: Markdown Test Blog
item.description: Test Blog with Mathematical Equations Testing the markdown parser with mathematical equations. Mathematical Concepts Here's a simple equation that demonstrates the relationship between energy and mass...

item.title: Books
item.description: Books Books I have read by category: Business & Tech 1. Zero to One - Peter Thiel 2. Thinking, Fast and Slow - Daniel Kahneman 3. The Signal and Noise - Nate Silver 4. Freakonomics - Stephen J. Dubner...
